description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that includes the remote file https://gitlab.com/wpdesk/gitlab-ci/raw/master/gitlab-ci-1.2.yml and sets the following variables: DISABLE_ACCEPTANCE='1', DISABLE_CODECEPTION=1, DISABLE_FUNCTIONAL='1', DISABLE_PHP_5_5=1, IS_LIBRARY=1. These variables disable acceptance, Codeception, functional tests and PHP 5.5 support, and mark the project as a library. No additional jobs or stages are defined in this file; the included configuration provides the necessary jobs.
